rationale: The parent command line in A0 and EV-001 shows an attempt to copy 'WindowsServiceExample.exe' to two locations, 'C:\Program Files\windows_service.exe' and 'C:\program.exe', followed by the creation and starting of a new service named 'Example Service' using 'C:\Program Files\windows_service.exe'. While creating a service is not inherently malicious, the multiple copies of the executable and the execution from a temporary directory (C:\Users\ADMINI~1\AppData\Local\Temp\) are suspicious and warrant further investigation.
